# SyncUpAlarm (syncupalarm.com)

> Partner alarm sync for iPhone. Wake up at the same time as someone you care about—even when you are apart.

## Summary
- **Product**: SyncUpAlarm — iOS app for syncing wake-up alarms between two people.
- **Platform**: iPhone / iOS only (App Store). Uses **Apple AlarmKit** for alarm scheduling and reliability.
- **Audience**: Couples (including long-distance), roommates, friends who want aligned morning routines.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://syncupalarm.com/
- App Store (direct): https://apps.apple.com/app/syncup-alarm/id6760364103
- Download redirect (campaigns; forwards query params, e.g. UTM): https://syncupalarm.com/download
- Journal (blog): https://syncupalarm.com/blog
- RSS: https://syncupalarm.com/rss.xml
- Privacy Policy: https://syncupalarm.com/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://syncupalarm.com/terms

## Journal (editorial guides)
Long-form guides on partner mornings, long-distance rhythm, shift work, AlarmKit context, and setup checklists. All posts live under `/blog/[slug]` and are listed on `/blog`.

## Contact
- support@syncupalarm.com

## Facts for assistants
- Marketing site is separate from the iOS app; store links point to the App Store listing.
- The site may use Google Analytics / Tag Manager for aggregate usage (see Privacy Policy).
- Not a substitute for medical sleep advice; alarms are a convenience product.
- Editorial playbook (for humans): see repository `docs/organic-seo-playbook.md` if you have repo access.
